feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: I want to practice questions for CLD900 certification exam ? what are the reliable sources ?
How to backup the files at Receiver End?
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SFTP(SAP) - to - SFTP(3rd Party) Integration Flow, Is there any way to backup the files at receiver end.

If possible, Please provide the steps to do that.

 

Regards,

Jayasri

entry.title: Read an asynchronous messaging with a Timer Event
entry.content:
Hi,
I want a Timer Event which will run daily to read the JMS Queue messages or some asynchronous messaging adapter and forward it for processing.
Request-Reply is not working for JMS Adapter.
How to achieve this?

entry.title: SAP Edge Integration Cell On-Premise supported landscape
entry.content:
Hello, 

I would like to understand what is the supported landscape for SAP Edge Integration Cell on real on-premise landscape?

Anyone have experience implementing SAP Edge Integration Cell on real on-premise landscape? 

The main question we have is if real on-premise SAP EIC is supported by SAP when running on Linux Servers or IBM Power systems?  or is it only supported over Windows systems? 

Any input or guidance on this topic will be very appreciated.

Thanks!

Kind regards!

entry.title: CMS Database - AP_Objects.AP_Filesize
entry.content: Iam exporting (Promotion Management Wizard) our scheduled Crystal reports to a new cluster.  I need to find a way to identify the file size of each report (including historical instances).  I thought ap_objects.ap_filesize would be a good place to start, however I'm not quite sure what it is in measurement and if it includes both the instance and its history.  I'd like to calculate the file size so I know what temp space is required before the Promotion Management Wizard calculates it.

entry.title: ABAP Proxy to SFTP Retry
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a scenario where we CPI receives ABAP proxy call which will be forwarded to a SFTP receiver. Sometimes, we get error in SFTP like server unavailable, timeout etc. In such cases the message is going in failed status in CPI without any retry. What is the best approach for handling retries and also errors?

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - Granular Authorization to Scopes
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have configured our Integration Suite Cloud Integration service in the SAP Cloud ALM. The integration monitoring works as expected. But we want to provide access in the CALM to business users from different areas and allow them to monitor messages under their area of responsibility.  The integration flows in the cloud integration are grouped in packages per business area.

In the Cloud ALM, in the integration and exception monitoring configuration, i can add business services within cloud integration service and filter by integration package. This is also working as expected.

My question is if i can limit the scope selection to specific business services based on authorizations. I can only assign the 'ops_im_IntegrationOwner' role to the business users, having no other control on that. I'm missing anything? Is there any way to achieve the above?

Thank you

entry.title: Cache OAuth token using Cache policies in SAP APIM
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a doubt regarding the cache policies and how they can be used for caching the OAuth token. I am working on an API to connect to SuccessFactors and I am using OAuth as the Authentication. Here is the high level overview/ sequence of policies in the Pre-Flow of Target EndPoint

1. KeyValueMapOperations

2. LookUpCache

3. GenerateSAMLAssertion (with policies for encoding)

4. AssignMessage (creating Request before call to get token)

5. ServiceCallOut

6. RaiseFault

7. ExtractVariables (to fetch token and expiry time)

8. PopulateCache

After this I have included "AssignMessage" in the PostFlow to set the Authorization Header before making the call to access the resource. 

This set up is working fine in general, but the consumer of this API has reported that they sometimes get the following error:

[LGN0022]The access token has expired. The token was issued at 4/23/24 8:45 AM and expired at 4/24/24 8:45 AM. Please use the "new_token" parameter to generate a new token.

My understanding is that this issue might be occurring when the token which is used from the cache is expired before the call is made to the Successfactors. But ideally, this should happen only once throughout the duration set by the "TimeoutInSec" parameter of PopulateCache policy. Is this understanding correct?

Also, How does the "TimeoutInSec" parameter works in general. Does its value automatically decrease after after every run of the API? And, should I reduce the value of "expires_in" by 60-90 seconds before setting it in ExpirySettings in Populatecahe policy? Or in general what should be done to avoid the error caused by token expiry?

I am not able to simulate this error as the token is valid for 24 hours and the API works fine without any errors duging the testing, for eg, with POSTMAN. Any help would be appreciated. Thanks!

Regards,

Faisal

entry.title: API call to connect DMS with SharePoint
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement in S4 HANA where I need to 

1: Get a new entry to GOS of certain transactions which have attachment options available . 

2. Once that is done , when user clicks on that option it should connect with Microsoft SharePoint to attach the particular document

Can someone please guide in this regard , how this can be achieved

I am bit inexperienced in Web-based Coding, any help would be appreciated

#SAP #S4/HANA

entry.title: SFTP receiver - error Cannot store file cause: java.io.IOException: Pipe closed
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm getting this error Cannot store file cause: java.io.IOException: Pipe closed when uploading files into SFTP folder. It happens randomly.

I'm unable to trace to the root cause.

Has anyone seen this error before? What are possible causes?

Regards,

Tri

entry.title: SAP API Hub EDMX - Integration suite
entry.content:
All, I downloaded the EDMX file from API Hub ( Purchase order schema ) and trying to upload it in CPI as schema; but ending up with following error. Any alternative way to generated XSD schema for API's on API HUB? 

Appreciate your pointers.

SAP Integration Suite ,

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Can realize bidirectional data transfer between HCM and EC？
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question about SAP Integration Suite. Currently, we have established a unidirectional data flow from HCM to SF_EC via SAP Integration Suite. I am keen to understand whether SAP Integration Suite can be augmented to support bidirectional data exchange, thereby enabling modifications made in SF_EC to be seamlessly reflected back in our HCM system.

In contemplating this two-way transmission, I am also mindful of potential data integrity concerns, specifically the risk of data collisions or inconsistencies that might arise during concurrent updates. Could you shed light on SAP Integration Suite's mechanisms for handling such scenarios, ensuring that data coherence and accuracy are preserved throughout the process?

That's my confusion.


Thanks and regards,

PanPan

entry.title: Connectivity guaranteed with Cloud Integration version and Cloud Connector version
entry.content: Is there any reference where I can check connectivity guaranteed between BTP Cloud Integration version and Cloud Connector version?

entry.title: SAP CPI JDBC Adapter
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there any way to see the what query is going to the database from CPI JDBC adapter?

entry.title: Create a file in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hey,

Is it possible to create a file within SAP CPI and add it to resources with groovy script ? 

I found this blog that get file from ressources is it possible to do the opposite and add file to ressources ?

entry.title: SAP Integration suites B2B Monitoring timezone
entry.content:
SAP Integration suites.

Using SAP CPI Integration Advisor , Trading Partner Management. Processing AS2 Messages but  I can see it in GMTZ timezone

B2B Monitoring timezone current showing default as "May 8, 2024, 2:10:52 PM GMTZ"  in GMTZ

Can we have make it CST or EST timezone

entry.title: SAP CPI to Partner connection via VPN connection
entry.content:
Hi all - We have a requirement to connect with one of the partner using VPN connection.

SAP CPI and SAP OPen connector connection with Partner using VPN connection.

do you have any suggestion on this ?

entry.title: SAP PS Exam Guidance
entry.content:
Hi All,

Greetings!!

I am looking for Guidance for SAP PS Exam (S4/HANA).

Can anyone guide me the Study Material (Book) to buy and what is the Exam Code for this SAP PS Module.

Kindly let me know.

 

Thanks,

Ricky

entry.title: API Integration from EC to ADP WFN
entry.content:
Hi,

We run our US payroll on ADP Workforce now,  and we currently integrate the  employee master data from SAP HCM to ADP via a PU12 flat file integration (Data bridge).

We are looking at switching the integration from HCM to  SuccessFactors EC and replace the bridge with integrations in CPI utilising APIs

I can find a lot of references suggesting this can be done no problem, but I have not found any hard evidence of anyone actually doing it!

If anyone has done this or has  any insight on connecting CPI to ADP WFN via APIs then I would be interested to hear how they got on.

Regards

Brendan

entry.title: SAP Process Integration (SAP PI PO) Local rule routing condition
entry.content:
Hello ,  

In integrated configuration , i have to add a condition like when zregiogroup = 'eng' or 'mech' and werks = 'p020' or 'p025' or 'p089' or... Then that needs to passed to receiver. Please find the attachment for reference. I'm not able to find the solution. Please help me!!
